title: Reference UI findings for ticket workspace redesign
summary: Concise evidence package comparing the current ticket workspace with pi-mono settings, oh-my-pi tabbed settings, pi-subagents overlays, and modal/tab navigation guidance.

title: pi-subagents overlay manager evidence
summary: Source-backed evidence that pi-subagents uses a centered overlay, multi-screen modal shell, rich list behaviors, and explicit Esc/back semantics that map well to a ticket workbench redesign.

title: PI settings selector evidence
summary: Source-backed evidence from pi-mono and oh-my-pi that `/settings` uses a focused selector shell with submenus, tabbed navigation, descriptions, and clean focus restoration.
